allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const c=fs.readFileSync\(''backend/src/services/aiAnalysis.service.ts'',''utf-8''\); const idx=c.indexOf\(''salesByMonth''\); console.log\(''salesByMonth context:'', JSON.stringify\(c.substring\(idx, idx+80\)\)\); const idx2=c.indexOf\(''REGRA DE OURO''\); console.log\(''REGRA context:'', JSON.stringify\(c.substring\(idx2-5, idx2+50\)\)\); const idx3=c.indexOf\(''tendencias de alta''\); console.log\(''emoji context:'', JSON.stringify\(c.substring\(idx3-30, idx3+20\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); const Redis = require\(''ioredis''\); const redis = new Redis\(process.env.REDIS_URL\); \(async \(\) => { const ok = await redis.keys\(''optimus:*''\); const ak = await redis.keys\(''agent:*''\); const all = [...ok, ...ak]; if \(all.length > 0\) { await redis.del\(...all\); console.log\(''Deleted '' + all.length + '' keys \('' + ok.length + '' optimus, '' + ak.length + '' agent\)''\); } else { console.log\(''No cache keys found''\); } redis.disconnect\(\); }\)\(\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")
